records.label: Bird Dog HERO
records.mask_method: Conservative RGB/luminance hair mask inside manual head ROI (250, 275, 535, 472), connected-component cleanup, 5px local expansion, 2.2px feather, alpha capped at 72%.
records.hair_lightness_change: Local hair pixels lightly lifted; highlights and strand contrast preserved.
records.hair_color_shift: Copper/dark-brunette cast reduced by adding green/blue balance and limiting red-orange dominance; no global photo change.
records.notes: Preview only. Source remains unchanged. Mask constrained to hair/head area and does not intentionally affect face, skin, top, room or mat.
